title: Special Agent K-7
writer: Phil Dunham, Leslie Spiller, George Zimmer
actors: Walter McGrail, Queenie Smith, Irving Pichel
plot: Famous criminal lawyer Lester Owens wins the release of his client, Eddie Geller, when Geller's trial ends with a deadlocked jury. A short time later, Vince "Lanny" Landers, F.B.I. Special Agent K-7, returns home from a trip to Eu...
